title: OpenAI Fellows Fall 2018
summary: We’re now accepting applications for the next cohort of OpenAI Fellows, a program which offers a compensated 6-month apprenticeship in AI research at OpenAI.
summaryZh: 我们现在正在接受下一批OpenAI研究员的申请，该计划为OpenAI的人工智能研究提供为期6个月的补偿学徒。
highlights: We’re now accepting applications for the next cohort of OpenAI Fellows, a program which offers a compensated 6-month apprenticeship in AI research at OpenAI.
highlightsZh: 我们现在正在接受下一批OpenAI研究员的申请，该计划为OpenAI的人工智能研究提供为期6个月的补偿学徒。
originalContentWarning: 该条资讯暂未抓取正文快照，当前保留了标题、摘要和原文链接。

title: Gym Retro
summary: We’re releasing the full version of Gym Retro, a platform for reinforcement learning research on games. This brings our publicly-released game count from around 70 Atari games and 30 Sega games to over 1,000 games across a variety of backing emulators. We’re also releasing the tool we use to add new games to the platfo
summaryZh: 我们正在发布Gym Retro的完整版本，这是一个用于游戏强化学习研究的平台。这使我们公开发布的游戏数量从大约70款雅达利游戏和30款世嘉游戏增加到超过1,000款游戏，涵盖各种支持模拟器。我们还发布了用于向平台添加新游戏的工具
highlights: We’re releasing the full version of Gym Retro, a platform for reinforcement learning research on games.
This brings our publicly-released game count from around 70 Atari games and 30 Sega games to over 1,000 games across a variety of backing emulators.

title: AI and compute
summary: We’re releasing an analysis showing that since 2012, the amount of compute used in the largest AI training runs has been increasing exponentially with a 3.4-month doubling time (by comparison, Moore’s Law had a 2-year doubling period)[^footnote-correction]. title: AI safety via debate
titleZh: 通过辩论实现人工智能安全
summary: We’re proposing an AI safety technique which trains agents to debate topics with one another, using a human to judge who wins.
summaryZh: 我们提出了一种人工智能安全技术，该技术培训代理商相互讨论话题，使用人来判断谁是赢家。
highlights: We’re proposing an AI safety technique which trains agents to debate topics with one another, using a human to judge who wins.
highlightsZh: 我们提出了一种人工智能安全技术，该技术培训代理商相互讨论话题，使用人来判断谁是赢家。
